notes:
◆ Feature Updates and Optimizations ◆
[Hide & Seek Party]
A Hide & Seek Party has been added to the Party system. D.G. Members can play as Mysterious Grimkin Hosts, who transform into furniture and hide, or as Investigative Journalists, who use the Survey Drone to find and capture them.

[Parkour Party]
A Parkour Party has been added to the Party system. D.G. Members can use pillars, walls, and platforms to create obstacle courses and enjoy building challenges with others.

* Prepare for NEW levels!
* Unlock NEW Disney characters!
* Join the magic with NEW DISNEY FEATURES!
* Enjoy performance improvements for a smoother gaming experience!
Play Disney Solitaire!

title: Honor of Kings
notes:
Update Content
1. Four new heroes—Thunderous Deep: Devara, Gentle Blade: Florentino, Nightmare Incarnate: Lorion, and Diviner: Annette have arrived!
2. A new Mythic skin, Avant-Garde Director Yaria, is here. Point Draw discounts are coming!
3. Hero Balance Adjustments:
a) Mechanics Upgraded: Sima Yi and Li Xin
b) Stats Buffed: Lian Po, Ming, Zhuangzi, and Augran
c) Stats Nerfed: Pei and Nezha

title: Archero 2
notes:
1. Added Legendary Heroes Demeter and Artemis and exclusive Skins.
2. Added Guild Raid, Camp Visit, Friendly Duel, Charm System, Titles, and Rankings.
3. Rumble Ladder S3 begins with the new 3v3 Football Rumble mode.
4. Added Gear & Rune Lock
5. Unlocked Shackled Jungle 1101-1300, Campaign 161-170, and Hard 146-155.
6. Added defensive bonuses in Peak Arena.
7. Improved Guild Expedition stats, event chat, and scoring.
8. Reduced chapter difficulty and fixed various issues.

title: Mystery Town: Merge Games
notes: More exciting events will be launched one after another, stay tuned！

title: Family Island — Farming game
notes:
Hey Islanders!
We're always improving Family Island! This update includes bug fixes, performance enhancements, and a whole lot of love to make your island life even better.
Explore, adventure, and win amazing rewards!
Want to share the fun? Invite your friends to play and get FREE REWARDS! Join our community on Facebook and Instagram for more fun.
Loving Family Island? Leave a review!
